mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT m.member_id, s.student_name AS name, m.login_id, m.email, 'STUDENT' AS role_code, '학생' AS role_name, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM student_parent sp WHERE sp.student_id = s.student_id AND sp.link_status = 1 ) THEN '연결' ELSE '미연결' END AS connection_status, TO_CHAR(m.last_login_at, 'YY/MM/DD') AS last_login_at, m.account_status FROM member m JOIN student s ON m.member_id = s.student_id WHERE m.account_status != 'DELETED'
UNION ALL
SELECT m.member_id, p.parent_name AS name, m.login_id, m.email, 'PARENT' AS role_code, '학부모' AS role_name, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM student_parent sp WHERE sp.parent_id = p.parent_id AND sp.link_status = 1 ) THEN '연결' ELSE '미연결' END AS connection_status, TO_CHAR(m.last_login_at, 'YY/MM/DD') AS last_login_at, m.account_status FROM member m JOIN parent p ON m.member_id = p.parent_id WHERE m.account_status != 'DELETED' ) ORDER BY member_id
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET account_status = #{accountStatus}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( member_id, login_id, pwd, email, account_status, login_fail_count, last_login_at, locked_at, pwd_changed_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{registDTO.loginId}, #{registDTO.initialPassword}, #{registDTO.email}, 'ACTIVE', 0, SYSDATE, NULL, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO authority ( authority_id, member_id, role_code, role_name ) VALUES ( #{authorityId}, #{memberId}, 'STUDENT', '학생' )

INSERT INTO student ( student_id, student_name, birth, gender, phone, profile_image, intro, created_at, updated_at, parent_link_code ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{registDTO.studentName}, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, 'LINK-' || #{memberId} )

INSERT INTO login_log ( login_log_id, member_id, login_id, login_result, login_type, ip_address, user_agent, fail_reason, created_at ) VALUES ( #{loginLogId}, #{memberId}, #{loginId}, #{loginResult}, #{loginType}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{failReason}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE ACCOUNT_STATUS != 'DELETED'

SELECT day_list.day_label AS dayLabel, NVL(login_data.login_count, 0) AS loginCount FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (7 - LEVEL), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS day_key, TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (7 - LEVEL), 'MM/DD') AS day_label FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 7 ) day_list LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS day_key, COUNT(*) AS login_count FROM login_log WHERE login_result = 'SUCCESS' AND created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 6 AND created_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1 GROUP BY TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ) login_data ON day_list.day_key = login_data.day_key ORDER BY day_list.day_key

SELECT day_list.day_label AS dayLabel, NVL(login_data.login_count, 0) AS loginCount FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (7 - LEVEL), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS day_key, TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (7 - LEVEL), 'MM/DD') AS day_label FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 7 ) day_list LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS day_key, COUNT(*) AS login_count FROM login_log WHERE login_result = 'SUCCESS' AND member_id = #{memberId} AND created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 6 AND created_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1 GROUP BY TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ) login_data ON day_list.day_key = login_data.day_key ORDER BY day_list.day_key
